ddls:
CREATE TABLE "schools" (
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school */,
  "school_name" TEXT /* Name of the school */,
  "school_type" TEXT /* Type of school (e.g., District, Charter) */,
  "total_students" INTEGER /* Total number of students in the school */,
  "total_budget" REAL /* Total budget of the school */,
  "school_address" TEXT /* Address of the school */,
  "school_city" TEXT /* City where the school is located */,
  "school_state" TEXT /* State where the school is located */,
  "school_zipcode" TEXT /* Zipcode of the school */,
  "school_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the school */,
  "principal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the principal */,
  "enrollment_year" INTEGER /* Year of the enrollment data */,
  "per_student_budget" REAL /* Budget allocated per student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schools_principal_id FOREIGN KEY ("principal_id") REFERENCES administrators ("admin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "school_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school performance record */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the performance data */,
  "avg_math_score" REAL /* Average math score of the school */,
  "avg_reading_score" REAL /* Average reading score of the school */,
  "avg_science_score" REAL /* Average science score of the school */,
  "passing_math_rate" REAL /* Passing rate for math */,
  "passing_reading_rate" REAL /* Passing rate for reading */,
  "passing_science_rate" REAL /* Passing rate for science */,
  "overall_passing_rate" REAL /* Overall passing rate */,
  "total_students" INTEGER /* Total number of students in the school for the specific year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_school_performance_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "budget_ranges" (
  "range_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each spending range record */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the budget range data */,
  "spending_range" TEXT /* Spending range per student (e.g., $615-645, <$585) */,
  "min_spending_per_student" REAL /* Minimum spending per student in the range */,
  "max_spending_per_student" REAL /* Maximum spending per student in the range */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("range_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budget_ranges_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "school_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the school type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the school type */,
  "is_charter" INTEGER /* Indicates if the school type is a charter school */,
  "funding_model" TEXT /* Funding model for the school type (e.g., state-funded, privately-funded) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "administrators" (
  "admin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each administrator */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school */,
  "admin_name" TEXT /* Name of the administrator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the administrator */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the administrator (e.g., Principal, Superintendent) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the administrator */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the administrator */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the administrator was hired */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_administrators_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Administrator, Analyst) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
column_names: Total number of students in the school
